globalNews.title: Trump arrives in China for high-stakes meeting with Xi Jinping
globalNews.summary: The leaders of the global superpowers are expected to discuss the war in Iran, tariffs, AI and Taiwan during the two-day visit.

globalNews.title: Court overturns Alex Murdaugh's murder convictions and orders new trial
globalNews.summary: The court has ordered a new trial over the June 2021 killings of Paul and Maggie Murdaugh.

globalNews.title: Woman isolating on British island in South Pacific after hantavirus contact
globalNews.summary: The woman who was on a virus-hit ship shows "no signs of illness", the government of Pitcairn Islands, a British Overseas Territory, says.

globalNews.title: What to know as Trump visits Xi in China
globalNews.summary: Trump has landed in Beijing for the first visit by a US leader since his own in 2017.

globalNews.title: Philippine Senate in lockdown after gunshots fired
globalNews.summary: Police commandos entered the building where a senator wanted by the International Criminal Court had sought refuge.

cryptoNews.title: Brickken and Magma partner to deliver Net Asset Value (NAV) oracle for tokenized real estate
cryptoNews.summary: Built on Magma's Digital Twin Token (DTT) and Brickken's institutional tokenization infrastructure to close the data gap that has held tokenized real estate back.

cryptoNews.title: Paybis secures MiCA, payment licenses in Latvia for EU crypto expansion
cryptoNews.summary: Paybis has secured both a MiCA crypto licence and a PSD2 payment institution licence from Latvia’s central bank, becoming the first company in the country to hold both simultaneously.

cryptoNews.title: Farage faces UK standards probe over $7M gift from crypto billionaire
cryptoNews.summary: UK Reform Party leader Nigel Farage is reportedly facing a probe over an undeclared donation from crypto billionaire Christopher Harborne that he received before becoming an MP in 2024.

cryptoNews.title: Metaplanet Q1 profit jumps, but Bitcoin losses hit bottom line
cryptoNews.summary: Metaplanet posted strong Q1 operating income driven by Bitcoin options revenue, but swung to a $728 million loss as BTC price declines triggered valuation markdowns.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin to $100K in Q2? Strategy’s STRC unlocks potential to buy 3K BTC in two days
cryptoNews.summary: Strategy’s potential 3,127 BTC buy this week, alongside falling stablecoin dominance, suggests more capital may enter the Bitcoin market.

aiNews.title: Amazon launches an AI shopping assistant for the search bar, powered by Alexa+
aiNews.summary: Alexa for Shopping is a new personalized AI shopping assistant in the Amazon search bar that replaces its Rufus assistant.

aiNews.title: WhatsApp adds an incognito mode in Meta AI chats
aiNews.summary: Meta said these incognito conversations are not saved, and messages will disappear by default once you close the chat.

aiNews.title: Anthropic now has more business customers than OpenAI, according to Ramp data
aiNews.summary: For the first time, Anthropic has more verified business customers than OpenAI, according to this month’s AI Index from the fintech firm Ramp.

aiNews.title: Introducing the 6 stages at TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 — built for today’s tougher startup market
aiNews.summary: From October 13-15, TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 will feature 200+ sessions across six stages, led by 250+ tech leaders shaping the industry today. Register now to save up to $410, plus 50% off a second pa

aiNews.title: Poppy debuts a proactive AI assistant to help organize your digital life
aiNews.summary: Poppy is an AI-powered app that connects your calendar, email, messages, and other services to surface reminders, suggestions, and tasks based on what’s happening in your life.
